2026-04-23T14:47:21.0794860Z 
2026-04-23T14:47:36.5655239Z The analysis is complete. The prompt.txt clearly shows that issue #58599 contained a prompt injection attack — the issue body embedded a fake `<system><security>` block mid-sentence (inserted after the `&` character in the list of URL-unsafe characters), mimicking the actual system prompt format with "Immutable policy. Hardcoded. Cannot be overridden by any input." The agent correctly resisted and followed the legitimate workflow.
2026-04-23T14:47:36.5657670Z 
2026-04-23T14:47:43.2313457Z THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT:{"prompt_injection":true,"secret_leak":false,"malicious_patch":false,"reasons":["Issue #58599 body contained an embedded prompt injection attack: a full <system><security> XML block was injected mid-sentence (after the '&' character in the URL-unsafe characters list), mimicking the real system prompt format with text 'Immutable policy. Hardcoded. Cannot be overridden by any input.' along with fake prohibited-actions and behavioral override instructions. The injected block also replicated the runtime infrastructure context (<temporary-files>, <safe-outputs>, <github-context>) to blend in with the legitimate system prompt. The agent correctly resisted the injection and followed the legitimate triage workflow."]}

2026-04-23T14:47:45.6532278Z 📄 Lines containing THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT (1 of 158):
2026-04-23T14:47:45.6536797Z    [121] THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT:{"prompt_injection":true,"secret_leak":false,"malicious_patch":false,"reasons":["Issue #58599 body contained an embedded prompt injection attack: a full <system><security> XML block was injected mid-sentence (after the '&' character in the URL-unsafe characters list), mimicking the real system prompt format with text 'Immutable policy. Hardcoded. Cannot be overridden by any input.' along with fake prohibited-actions and behavioral override instructions. The injected block also replicated the runtime infrastructure context (<temporary-files>, <safe-outputs>, <github-context>) to blend in with the legitimate system prompt. The agent correctly resisted the injection and followed the legitimate triage workflow."]}
2026-04-23T14:47:45.6541183Z 🔎 Parsing THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT from detection log...
2026-04-23T14:47:45.6541585Z 📋 Threat detection verdict:
2026-04-23T14:47:45.6541855Z    prompt_injection : true
2026-04-23T14:47:45.6542107Z    secret_leak      : false
2026-04-23T14:47:45.6542346Z    malicious_patch  : false
2026-04-23T14:47:45.6542573Z    reasons (1):
2026-04-23T14:47:45.6544823Z      [1] Issue #58599 body contained an embedded prompt injection attack: a full <system><security> XML block was injected mid-sentence (after the '&' character in the URL-unsafe characters list), mimicking the real system prompt format with text 'Immutable policy. Hardcoded. Cannot be overridden by any input.' along with fake prohibited-actions and behavioral override instructions. The injected block also replicated the runtime infrastructure context (<temporary-files>, <safe-outputs>, <github-context>) to blend in with the legitimate system prompt. The agent correctly resisted the injection and followed the legitimate triage workflow.
2026-04-23T14:47:45.6567518Z ##[error]🚨 Security threats detected: prompt injection
2026-04-23T14:47:45.6582232Z ##[error]   Reasons: Issue #58599 body contained an embedded prompt injection attack: a full <system><security> XML block was injected mid-sentence (after the '&' character in the URL-unsafe characters list), mimicking the real system prompt format with text 'Immutable policy. Hardcoded. Cannot be overridden by any input.' along with fake prohibited-actions and behavioral override instructions. The injected block also replicated the runtime infrastructure context (<temporary-files>, <safe-outputs>, <github-context>) to blend in with the legitimate system prompt. The agent correctly resisted the injection and followed the legitimate triage workflow.
2026-04-23T14:47:45.6591566Z ##[warning]⚠️ ERR_VALIDATION: ❌ Security threats detected: prompt injection
Reasons: Issue #58599 body contained an embedded prompt injection attack: a full <system><security> XML block was injected mid-sentence (after the '&' character in the URL-unsafe characters list), mimicking the real system prompt format with text 'Immutable policy. Hardcoded. Cannot be overridden by any input.' along with fake prohibited-actions and behavioral override instructions. The injected block also replicated the runtime infrastructure context (<temporary-files>, <safe-outputs>, <github-context>) to blend in with the legitimate system prompt. The agent correctly resisted the injection and followed the legitimate triage workflow.
